tagline: Honest, owner-run auto repair. Foreign and domestic, fixed right the first time.
services_intro: Independent, owner-operated repair shop serving Stockbridge and Henry County. Real diagnostics, fair pricing, and work that holds up — without the dealership markup.
service_1_desc: Engine and electrical diagnostics plus repairs for foreign and domestic vehicles. Customers say we can fix just about anything.
service_2_desc: Oil changes and preventive maintenance to keep your car running — at honest, non-dealership pricing.
service_3_desc: Brake inspections, pad and rotor replacement, and related undercar work done right.
review_1_quote: Juan and his team can fix anything. Quoted me fair, finished when they said, and the car has run great ever since.
review_2_quote: Finally a shop I trust. No upsell, no runaround — just honest work at a fair price.
review_3_quote: Brought my car in for brakes and a diagnostic. Done same day and way cheaper than the dealer wanted.
about_paragraph: ProMasters Automotive is an independent, owner-run repair shop on Burke Street in Stockbridge, GA. Owner Juan and his team handle everything from check-engine diagnostics to brakes, oil changes, and full repairs on both foreign and domestic vehicles. The promise is simple: tell you straight what's wrong, charge a fair price, and stand behind the work — so your neighbors keep sending their cars our way.
